title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Blue Star India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Blue Star India
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
